title: Aqua Laguna Closes In
description: The Franky Family and Galley-La shipwrights join the Straw Hats, turning Robin’s rescue into a shared mission.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part follows Nico Nico Robin, Luffy, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. The Franky Family and Galley-La shipwrights join the Straw Hats, turning Robin’s rescue into a shared mission.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But haven't quit being a pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We'll take you with us anyhow.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...it hasn't been taken care of yet...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hey!!! Are you listening to me!!?

summary: The Franky Family and Galley-La shipwrights join the Straw Hats, turning Robin’s rescue into a shared mission.
